title: microsorum lineare
intro: Microsorum lineare, also known as Water Clover or Water Wryneck, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Microsorum lineare include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Microsorum lineare can be used in infusions, poultices, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
